message:
fix(ufunc): propagate NaN in cummin, cummax, mode, and heapsort

Use nan_last_cmp for mode sorting and heapsort instead of partial_cmp
with Equal fallback (which placed NaN unpredictably). Add NaN-propagating
closures to cummin/cummax so once a NaN is seen, all subsequent outputs
are NaN, matching NumPy behavior. Add tests for NaN propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
